notes: As previously reported this game has two issues out of the box: 1) libGLESv2.dll has C++ errors (that can be ignored) 2) The game shows a black screen after ignoring errors. Replacement of libGLESv2.dll and libEGL.dll from a different game (Shantae: Risky's Revenge worked for me) resolves the C++ errors. Adding D3Dcompiler_46.dll from Metal Slug 2 resolves the black screen. While replacement of files is more than a tweak, after these changes the game is 100% playable with no issues identified.
title: METAL SLUG
